message:
feat(abi): rewrite host_resolve with PHDR callback and ELF section header walking

Replace /proc/self/maps-only approach with more robust multi-strategy
host symbol resolution:

host_resolve.rs:
- Add dl_iterate_phdr-based PHDR callback for fast glibc discovery
- Add mmap-based direct ELF section header walking (Elf64Shdr,
  SHT_DYNSYM lookup) for symbol name matching without libc recursion
- Fall back to /proc/self/maps parsing when PHDR callback unavailable

malloc_abi.rs / pthread_abi.rs / stdio_abi.rs:
- Integrate improved host resolution paths for malloc/pthread/stdio
  symbol delegation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
